text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One night during summer camp, while I'm out
walking along the beach, listening to the waves
crash on the shore...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Fwahhh! Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A soaking-wet Yaeno Muteki suddenly emerges
from the ocean.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. I'm just finishing up some traditional
Kongo Yaegaki underwater training.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
First... you dive underwater, get a firm grip on
some rocks at the bottom with your toes, and
take position!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Then you slide forward one step at a time,
unleashing dozens of basic strikes as you go! In
other words, it's a martial arts performance in
pure darkness!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Breaks are not permitted, of course. And if you
lose your grip on the rocks for any reason and
float toward the surface, you have to start again
from the beginning.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Success is impossible unless you're able to stay
calm in the dark and manage your breathing. One
might call it the ultimate test.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It's meant to be performed in a full set of armor,
but if I can manage just this much, the
improvement to my cardio and strength should be
invaluable in a race!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Which is all to say... I'm going back under! Osu!
choice_data_list: At least let me tie a safety rope to you.
At least let me tie a safety rope to you.
Could you maybe do that... another time?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Which is all to say... I'm going back under! Osu!
choice_data_list: At least let me tie a safety rope to you.
At least let me tie a safety rope to you.
Could you maybe do that... another time?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Understood! I'll get a rope right away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once she's ready again, I wait on the beach,
watching as columns of water, presumably from
some attack, occasionally erupt from the ocean
surface. Until...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hwaaah! Osu!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Success! I did it, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
A martial arts performance in pure darkness is
much like a battle with one's own self. I feel like
I've come to know the meaning of "true devotion"
all over again.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That alone made this all worth it. Thank you for
letting me do this training! Osu!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I felt pretty nervous while I was waiting for her,
but it looks like Yaeno Muteki's training has paid
off!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pwaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I can't do it! Did I misjudge how quickly to let the
air out of my lungs?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Again! I'm going to try one more time! This time
I've got it!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Fine. But I'll definitely get it next time we come
to the beach!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hm... I suppose I should train specifically with races in mind during summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
In that case, is there something else I could be
doing right now? Should I go back to the
campsite?
choice_data_list: If you'd like, we could go for a short walk.
If you'd like, we could go for a short walk.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Yes, if that's all right. Now that I take a
closer look, this area is quite beautiful in its
tranquility.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I just remembered something a certain
practitioner once said. "One must pick up the
brush to master the sword." In other words, one
must understand many arts to excel in combat.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Since we're in such a beautiful place, maybe I
should take this opportunity to compose a haiku.
Let's see...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The sea is pretty.
The stars are pretty, also.
I am happy now.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Never mind. Forget I said anything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, we walk along the beach for a while
before returning to the campgrounds.
